debug_info.goal:
C : Type
inst✝¹ : Category.{0, 0} C
K : Type
inst✝ : DivisionRing K
M : CategoryTheory.Functor C (ModuleCat K)
D : @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M
hmax : IsMin D
x y : PersistenceSubmodule M
hxy : Disjoint x y
hN : x ⊔ y ∈ D
hx : ¬x = ⊥
hy : ¬y = ⊥
B : (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) → N ∈ D → Set (PersistenceSubmodule M) := ⋯
⊢ ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), ⊥ ∉ B N hN

proof:
fun N hN ↦ by
      dsimp [B]
      split_ifs
      · simp [Set.mem_insert_iff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, Ne.symm hx, Ne.symm hy]
      · exact fun h ↦ D.not_bot_mem (h ▸ hN)

  have h_strict : newD < D := by

    rw [h_eq', disjoint_self] at hxy
    exact hy hxy
  exact not_le_of_lt h_strict (hmax (le_of_lt h_strict))
